title: No Escape
description: Apply 10 [gold]Doom[/gold], plus an additional 5 [gold]Doom[/gold] for every 10 [gold]Doom[/gold] already on this enemy.
upgraded_description: Apply 15 [gold]Doom[/gold], plus an additional 5 [gold]Doom[/gold] for every 10 [gold]Doom[/gold] already on this enemy.
notes: Doom scaling: the card applies an amount of Doom equal to the base value (10), plus an additional amount for each multiple of the threshold (10) already on the target. With 10 existing Doom, applies 10+5=15. With 20 existing Doom, applies 10+10=20, etc.
